ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Recommended for notes with few videos/audio files as it keeps Obsidian fast.
ast.target: 推荐用于视频/音频文件较少的笔记，可保持 Obsidian 的运行速度。

ast.name: confirm

ast.name: confirm

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WebCrypto API is not supported. Code challenge method will default to use plain instead of sha256.
ast.target: 不支持 WebCrypto API。代码挑战方法将默认使用 plain 而非 sha256。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Error when querying Navigator LockManager state
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 查询 Navigator LockManager 状态时出错

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Navigator LockManager returned a null lock when using #request without ifAvailable set to true, it appears this browser is not following the LockManager spec https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/LockManager/request
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 在未将 ifAvailable 设为 true 的情况下使用 #request 时，Navigator LockManager 返回了空锁，似乎该浏览器未遵循 LockManager 规范 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/LockManager/request

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Multiple GoTrueClient instances detected in the same browser context. It is not an error, but this should be avoided as it may produce undefined behavior when used concurrently under the same storage key.
ast.target: 在同一浏览器上下文中检测到多个 GoTrueClient 实例。这不是错误，但应避免这种情况，因为在同一存储键下并发使用可能会产生未定义行为。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Using the user object as returned from supabase.auth.getSession() or from some supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange() events could be insecure! This value comes directly from the storage medium (usually cookies on the server) and may not be authentic. Use supabase.auth.getUser() instead which authenticates the data by contacting the Supabase Auth server.
ast.target: 使用 supabase.auth.getSession() 返回的用户对象或某些 supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange() 事件中的用户对象可能不安全！该值直接来自存储介质（通常是服务器上的 Cookie），可能不可信。请改用 supabase.auth.getUser()，它会通过联系 Supabase Auth 服务器来验证数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued over 120s ago, URL could be stale
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 从 URL 获取的会话在 120 秒前已签发，URL 可能已过期

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued in the future? Check the device clock for skew
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 从 URL 获取的会话似乎是在未来签发的？请检查设备时钟是否有偏差

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setSelf function cannot be used with read-only atom
ast.target: setSelf 函数不能用于只读 atom

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setSelf function cannot be called in sync

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Detected multiple Jotai instances. It may cause unexpected behavior with the default store. https://github.com/pmndrs/jotai/discussions/2044
ast.target: 检测到多个 Jotai 实例。使用默认 store 时可能会导致意外行为。https://github.com/pmndrs/jotai/discussions/2044

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manage login credentials for accessing content from password-protected sources like cloud storage (WebDAV, Nextcloud) and private file servers. These credentials are securely stored locally and used to stream media and files.
ast.target: 管理用于访问受密码保护来源（如云存储 WebDAV、Nextcloud 和私有文件服务器）的登录凭据。这些凭据会安全地存储在本地，并用于流式播放媒体和文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manage login credentials for streaming media from password-protected sources like WebDAV servers, Nextcloud, private file servers, and other authenticated media sources.
ast.target: 管理用于从受密码保护的来源（如 WebDAV 服务器、Nextcloud、私有文件服务器及其他需要身份验证的媒体源）流媒体播放的登录凭据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This feature is only available on desktop.
ast.target: 此功能仅在桌面端可用。
